title: Modding Done Right
description: This modpack has the perfect amount of mods so you don't get overloaded, and don't get bored.
body:
# Modding Done Right (MDR) ### About A modpack that adds many great mods to the game without ruining the vanilla experience or overloading you with features (and keybinds!). This modpack also adds some mods that just enhance the game or make your life easier.
***More mods may be added in the future.*** ### Sources - Modrinth - CurseForge
Included Content ### Included Mods - Farmers Delight - Nether's Delight - End's Delight - AppleCraft Ultimate (I'm sorry for including my own mod) - AppleSkin - FallingTree - Not Enough Animations - 3D Skin Layers - Simple Voice Chat - Sound Physics Remastered - Oculus - Just Enough Items (JEI) - Sophisticated Backpacks - Supplementaries - Continuity - Waystones ### Included Resource Packs - Small Shield and Totem - Low on Fire - Fresh Animations ### Included Shaders - Complementary Shaders (Reimagined) ### Included Dependancy/Library Mods - Embeddium - Sophisticated Core - Moonlight Lib - Entity Model Features (EMF) - Entity Texture Features (ETF) - Sinytra Connector - Balm
How to install on server ### **Here's a step by step guide on how to install this modpack on a server!**
***Ignore this if you will be playing on singleplayer, some hosting mod (such as essential), or LAN.*** 1. Install 1.20.1 Forge modloader as the software on your server. 2. Install the following mods in your server's ```mods``` folder: - AppleCraft Ultimate - End's Delight - Farmer's Delight - FallingTree - Just Enough Items (JEI) - Moonlight Lib - Nether's Delight - Sophisticated Backpacks - Sophisticated Core - Sound Physics Remastered - Supplementarys - Simple Voice Chat - Waystones
